acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_prose_001] PASS if the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:273 no longer state Rafe's private thought content as omniscient fact and instead anchor motive in visible behavior or Della's speculative reading; FAIL if the narration still tells the reader what he is internally calculating.

[chapter_03_prose_002] PASS if the revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:479, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:517, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:521, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:525, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:547 uses no more than two silence/refusal beats with the same sentence shape and includes at least one new action or line that changes the temperature of the exchange; FAIL if the passage still stacks repeated refusal constructions without variation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:273 no longer state Rafe's private thought content as omniscient fact and instead anchor motive in visible behavior or Della's speculative reading; FAIL if the narration still tells the reader what he is internally calculating.
findings.problem: The close third occasionally reports Rafe's unseen interior as fact ("It was arithmetic," "thinking of bank notes and feed advances," "already carrying away what mattered to him") instead of keeping his motive filtered through Della's interpretation. That drifts outside the style bible's close-third rule.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:273 so Rafe's motives are rendered through observable cues or clearly marked Della-inference rather than direct access to his internal thought.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:479, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:517, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:521, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:525, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:547 uses no more than two silence/refusal beats with the same sentence shape and includes at least one new action or line that changes the temperature of the exchange; FAIL if the passage still stacks repeated refusal constructions without variation.
findings.problem: The kitchen climax leans too often on near-identical refusal beats ("She did not answer," "She kept still," "I'm not answering that tonight"). Repeating the same null-response construction this many times flattens pressure instead of escalating it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the confrontation beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:479, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:517, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:521, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:525, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:547 with at least one fresh physical action, one sharper verbal dodge, and one leverage-changing response so Della's resistance evolves instead of repeating as silence.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally compromised caretaking, the bureaucratic brutality of naming, and the physical labor of moving the dead. When an edge case appears, prefer the detail a witness would remember over the phrasing a polite narrator would use. Let tenderness exist inside harsh material without cleaning the harshness off.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If childbirth, exhumation, poverty, sexual history, bodily decay, or violence enters a scene, render it through specific sensation and consequence; summarizing away the hard fact counts as a failed pass, not tasteful restraint.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High overall; contractions are the norm across dialogue, with fuller forms reserved for class performance, legal formality, deliberate emphasis, or a character trying not to lose composure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public labor chapters with quieter domestic or inventory chapters, vary scene count and dialogue density, let some chapters turn on information or paperwork rather than confrontation, and ensure no two consecutive chapters share the same dominant mechanism, pace, or emotional temperature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken historical Appalachian-Southern English without caricature; concrete, unsentimental, regionally grounded, and alert to how legal language clashes with lived speech.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Della Bledsoe, intimate enough to track bodily memory and evasive thought while never slipping into other characters' interior monologue as fact
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular work-sentence compression with longer accumulating sentences that carry memory, atmosphere, and moral weight; let cadence tighten in hearings and exhumations, then widen in domestic or reflective passages.
